case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THRO VS. LESAFFRE YEAST CORP.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THRO UGH THE BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LESAFFRE YEAST CORP. $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,000.00, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AND SCANNED DOCUMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-12-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THRO UGH THE BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT LESAFFRE YEAST CORP. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-12-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-28-2003

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THRO UGH THE BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT SERVED APR-17-2003, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE APR-25-2003 AS TO DEFENDANT LESAFFRE YEAST CORP.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THRO UGH THE BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT LESAFFRE YEAST CORP.
